content.summaryText: Mindfulness for Clinical Settings in Sleep and Stress Medicine focuses on sleep pattern assessment and stress-load management. Primary objective: Guide 2-minute grounding.

content.questionText: In Mindfulness for Clinical Settings, which action best supports 'Guide 2-minute grounding'?
content.explanation: Correct answers prioritize patient safety, reassessment, and timely escalation.

options.text: Identify sleep disruptors and start behavior-based interventions
Using sedative-only strategies without behavioral foundations
Delay reassessment until symptoms are severe
Use treatment decisions without baseline documentation

content.summaryText: Immediate priority: identify sleep disruptors and start behavior-based interventions. Practical emphasis: Reduce cognitive overload.

content.questionText: Escalation is required when persistent insomnia with safety risk, severe depression, or substance misuse.
content.explanation: Early escalation reduces preventable deterioration and delays in definitive care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
